chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 550 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 28.02.2024 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Syed Wafa Hssan Shah, Law Officer of Regional Director (Colleges), Sukkur..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- It is informed that current salary of the petitioner has been released. Now, there is issue over the arrears of salaries. Learned AAG and Focal Person of respondent No.2 undertake that, as per law, the issue of the arrears of the salaries would be resolved and the amount would be disbursed to the petitioner within two months. The petition is accordingly disposed of in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
